stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the following information and based on the actual time overhead B, what will be the Estimated Time of Overflight (ETO) and estimated remaining fuel at waypoint C? 
Fuel flow: 900 lb/h

options.a: ETO 13:10, and estimated remaining fuel 1270 lb.
options.b: ETO 13:22, and estimated remaining fuel 1270 lb.
options.c: ETO 13:10, and estimated remaining fuel 1450 lb.
options.d: ETO 13:22, and estimated remaining fuel 1450 lb.
